viewsContainer.title: Audio Analyzer
views.welcomeView.name: Audio Analyzer
viewsWelcome.contents:
Analyze audio files or folders.

[Select files / folder to analyze](command:audioWandasAnalyzer.analyzeFile)

You can also right-click an audio file or folder in the Explorer and choose "Analyze with Audio Analyzer".

configuration.defaultPeakCount.descripti: Number of dominant frequency peaks shown per channel.
configuration.debugFilePath.description: Debug audio file or directory path used by the Analyze Debug Path command. Relative paths are resolved from the first workspace folder.
